plugin.name: s3
plugin.description: S3-compatible object storage: upload, download, delete, presign, list

conventions.name: put_object
conventions.description: Upload an object to an S3 bucket

conventions.name: get_object
conventions.description: Download an object from an S3 bucket

conventions.name: delete_object
conventions.description: Delete an object from an S3 bucket

conventions.name: presign_url
conventions.description: Generate a presigned URL for temporary access to an object

conventions.name: list_objects
conventions.description: List objects in an S3 bucket with optional prefix filter
